chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-542 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to non-prosecution 21.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. It was last taken up on 18.4.2022, which is over three years ago. In the last three years, learned counsel for the petitioner has made no serious efforts to pursue this petition; even compliance has not been made. Today the petition is fixed for non-prosecution. None present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
